Theorem abrexex 7943
Description: Existence of a class abstraction of existentially restricted sets. See the comment of abrexexg 7942. See also abrexex2 7950. (Contributed by NM, 16-Oct-2003.) (Proof shortened by Mario Carneiro, 31-Aug-2015.)
Hypothesis
Ref Expression
abrexex.1 ⊢ 𝐴 ∈ V
Assertion
Ref Expression
abrexex ⊢ {𝑦 ∣ ∃𝑥 ∈ 𝐴 𝑦 = 𝐵} ∈ V
Distinct variable groups:   𝑥,𝑦,𝐴   𝑦,𝐵
Allowed substitution hint:   𝐵(𝑥)
Proof of Theorem abrexex
StepHypRef Expression
1 abrexex.1 . 2 ⊢ 𝐴 ∈ V
2 abrexexg 7942 . 2 ⊢ (𝐴 ∈ V → {𝑦 ∣ ∃𝑥 ∈ 𝐴 𝑦 = 𝐵} ∈ V)
31, 2ax-mp 5 1 ⊢ {𝑦 ∣ ∃𝑥 ∈ 𝐴 𝑦 = 𝐵} ∈ V
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
Syntax hints:   = wceq 1560   ∈ wcel 2142  {cab 2740  ∃wrex 3086  Vcvv 3454
